Nobias20 plotting

Lambda = 20

Brady Johnston

06/07/2020

Reading in the data.

fl <- list.files("../nobias20/", pattern = "COLVAR", recursive = T, full.names = T)
df <- read.table(fl[1])
colnames(df) <- c("time", "path.sss", "path.zzz")
head(df) %>% stargazer(type = "text", summary = F)
## 
## ========================
##   time path.sss path.zzz
## ------------------------
## 1  0    1.085    -0.002 
## 2  1    1.096    0.001  
## 3  2    1.101    0.001  
## 4  3    1.102    0.002  
## 5  4    1.117    0.002  
## 6  5    1.126    0.003  
## ------------------------

Making the basic plots.

p1 <- ggplot(df, aes(path.sss, path.zzz, colour = time / 1e3)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.3) + 
  viridis::scale_colour_viridis() + 
  simpleThemes::simple_light() + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:5, limits = c(1,NA)) +
  labs(colour = "Time (ns)", title = "Z vs S", 
       subtitle = "REFERENCE=path_cmap_noH.pdb LAMBDA=10 NEIGH_STRIDE=50 NEIGH_SIZE=5") + 
  theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 5, family = "mono"))
p1 + ggsave("z_vs_s.pdf", width = 5, height = 3)

Calculating standard deviations

df$sd.zzz <- 0
df$sd.sss <- 0
for(i in 1:nrow(df)){
  df$sd.zzz[i] <- sd(df$path.zzz[1:i])
  df$sd.sss[i] <- sd(df$path.sss[1:i])
}
head(df) %>% stargazer(type = "text", summary = FALSE)
## 
## ======================================
##   time path.sss path.zzz sd.zzz sd.sss
## --------------------------------------
## 1  0    1.085    -0.002               
## 2  1    1.096    0.001   0.002  0.008 
## 3  2    1.101    0.001   0.002  0.008 
## 4  3    1.102    0.002   0.002  0.008 
## 5  4    1.117    0.002   0.002  0.011 
## 6  5    1.126    0.003   0.002  0.015 
## --------------------------------------

Plotting SD vs Time.

p2 <- ggplot(df, aes(time / 1e3, sd.zzz)) + 
  geom_line() + 
  simpleThemes::simple_light() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:5*2) + 
  labs(x = "Time (ns)", y = "Standard Deviation (zzz)", 
       title = "sd.zzz", subtitle = "REFERENCE=path_cmap_noH.pdb LAMBDA=10 NEIGH_STRIDE=50 NEIGH_SIZE=5") + 
  theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 5, family = "mono"))
p2 + ggsave("sd.zzz.pdf", width = 5, height = 3)
## Warning: Removed 1 row(s) containing missing values (geom_path).

## Warning: Removed 1 row(s) containing missing values (geom_path).

p3 <- ggplot(df, aes(time / 1e3, sd.sss)) + 
  geom_line() + 
  simpleThemes::simple_light() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:5*2) + 
  labs(x = "Time (ns)", y = "Standard Deviation (sss)", 
       title = "sd.sss", subtitle = "REFERENCE=path_cmap_noH.pdb LAMBDA=10 NEIGH_STRIDE=50 NEIGH_SIZE=5") + 
  theme(plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 5, family = "mono"))
p3 + ggsave("sd.sss.pdf", width = 5, height = 3)
## Warning: Removed 1 row(s) containing missing values (geom_path).

## Warning: Removed 1 row(s) containing missing values (geom_path).

Final values

These final values can be used for calculating relevant values for metaD simulations.

For the simulation the \(\sigma.sss =\) 0.4945 and \(\sigma.zzz =\) 0.0695 for the subsequent metaD simulations.

## 
## ==============================================
##        time    path.sss path.zzz sd.zzz sd.sss
## ----------------------------------------------
## 8156 8,155.000  3.232    0.210   0.139  0.989 
## 8157 8,156.000  3.232    0.209   0.139  0.989 
## 8158 8,157.000  3.213    0.203   0.139  0.989 
## 8159 8,158.000  3.207    0.201   0.139  0.989 
## 8160 8,159.000  3.204    0.196   0.139  0.989 
## 8161 8,160.000  3.184    0.197   0.139  0.989 
## ----------------------------------------------
